description: Create and activate an IRB-compliant sociological research survey titled 'Social Media Usage and Community Belonging Study 2024' in LimeSurvey (admin/Admin123!). The survey description must include 'IRB Protocol #2024-SOC-0847' and Principal Investigator 'Dr. Rebecca Thornton'. Ensure the welcome message mentions 'informed consent', 'voluntary', and 'anonymous', and the end message includes 'rthorn@stateuniv.edu' and 'Robert Putnam'. Configure the survey for anonymized responses, date stamps, no IP address saving, and a visible data policy notice. Use a group-by-group presentation format with a progress bar. The structure must consist of three question groups: 'Informed Consent' (containing a mandatory consent question), 'Social Media Usage', and 'Community Belonging' (each with at least one dummy question).

metadata.expected_title: Social Media Usage and Community Belonging Study 2024
